title: Generate a new app from the reference-app template
description: Clones apps/reference-app into apps/<slug> where <slug> is derived from the human-readable name. Use this generator to create a new application in a fork without modifying the canonical reference template.

name.description: Human-readable display name of the new app (e.g. "Shine"). The slug used for paths and project names is derived from this value.
name.x-prompt: What is the display name of the new app? (e.g. "Shine")

directory.description: Directory where the new app folder is created.
